remarks: Tucked away at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac in Norwalk's desirable Wolfpit neighborhood, this rare nearly one-acre parcel offers the perfect blend of privacy and convenience. Surrounded by established homes and mature trees, the property provides a serene setting while remaining just minutes from shopping, dining, and everyday essentials. Whether you're looking to build your dream home or invest in a prime piece of land in a sought-after location, this opportunity delivers both lifestyle and long-term value.
